description: Edge case: an episodic event with an explicit TTL via expires_at, no user_id (system-level observation), and an empty metadata object. Demonstrates optional-field boundary handling.

request.content: On 2026-05-26T14:02:11Z the deploy pipeline retried twice before succeeding.

notes: expires_at is ~90 days after stored_at, modelling a routine TTL on ephemeral ops episodes. user_id is omitted (allowed — only agent_id, type, content are required). metadata is intentionally empty to exercise the additionalProperties:true with zero keys path.
